optional_kwargs.output_tensor: preallocated tensor of same shape (optional, in-place write supported)

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: golden: torch.nan_to_num(torch.reciprocal(input_tensor_a), nan=device.sfpu_nan(), posinf=device.sfpu_inf(), neginf=-device.sfpu_inf()); test: golden_tensor = torch.reciprocal(in_data); fusion_notes: ["Frequently followed by ttnn.multiply/ttnn.mul as a division idiom (a * reciprocal(b) == a / b); seen in RMSNorm (x * reciprocal(rms)), softmax denominator (exp * reciprocal(sum+eps)), RoPE inv_freq (reciprocal(theta**exp)), and scheduler sigma scaling (sample * reciprocal(full(sigma))).
